revision.text:
[[ja:雨降神社]] {{Expand Japanese|雨降神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Amatarashi Shrine | native_name = 雨降神社 | image = Amatarashi shrine.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Amatarashi Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.096347|134.499069}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Toyotama-hime|qid=Q2329261|lt=Toyotama-hime|de|Toyotama-hime|en|Toyotama-hime|es|Toyotama-hime|fa|تویوتاما-هیمه|fi|Otohime|fr|Otohime|id|Toyotama-hime|ja|トヨタマヒメ|ko|도요타마히메|mni|ꯇꯣꯌꯣꯇꯃ-ꯍꯤꯃꯦ|pl|Toyotama-hime|ru|Тоётама-химэ|simple|Toyotama-hime|sv|Otohime|uk|Тойотама-хіме|vi|Toyotama-hime|zh|豐玉毘賣命|qid=Q2329261|1=Toyotama-hime}} }} {{nihongo|'''Amatarashi Shrine'''|雨降神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * in Awa Province (Tokushima)|ja|阿波国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11657514|1=List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)}} ** Series ordinal: 26 ** P155: {{ill|Mano- Shrine|lt=Mano- Shrine|qid=Q135041358|1=Mano- Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q11435424|ltq=Q11435424|qid=Q11435424|1=Omiwa Shrine (Tokushima)}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Tokushima (city)|lt=Tokushima|an|Tokushima|ar|توكوشيما (مدينة)|arz|توكوشيما|azb|توکوشیما (شهر)|az|Tokuşima|ban|Tokushima, Tokushima|be|Такусіма (горад)|bg|Токушима|ca|Tokushima|ceb|Tokushima Shi|ce|Токусима (provincia, Tokušima)|sr|Провинција Ава (Шикоку)|tr|Awa (vilayet, Tokushima)|uk|Провінція Ава (Шікоку)|zh_min_nan|Awa-kok (Nankaidô)|zh|阿波國|qid=Q907457|1=Awa Province (Tokushima)}} * ᥓᥣᥱ ᥙᥣᥢᥱ|tet|Japaun|te|జపాన్|tg|Ҷопон|th|ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|thnews|หมวดหมู่:ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|tig|ጃፓን|ti|ጃፓን|tk|Ýaponiýa|tl|Hapon|tly|Japonijə|tn|Japan|tok|ma Nijon|to|Siapani|tpi|Siapan|trv|Tanah Tunux|tr|Japonya|trnews|Kategori:Japonya|trquote|Japonya|trvoyage|Japonya|ts|Japani|tt|Япония|tum|Japan|tw|Japan|tyv|Япония|ty|Tāpōnē|udm|Япония|ug|ياپونىيە|uk|Японія|uknews|Категорія:Японія|ukquote|Японія|ukvoyage|Японія|ur|جاپان|uz|Yaponiya|vec|Japon|vep|Japonii|ve|Japan|vi|Nhật Bản|vibooks|Các quốc gia/Nhật Bản|vivoyage|Nhật Bản|vls|Japan|vo|Yapän|war|Hapon|wa|Djapon|wo|Sapoŋ|wuu|日本|xal|Ниxуудин Нутг|xh|IJapani|xmf|იაპონია|yi|יאפאן|yo|Japan|za|Nyiedbonj|zea|Japan|zgh|ⵏⵉⴱⵓⵏ|zh_classical|日本|zh_min_nan|Ji̍t-pún|zh_yue|日本|zh|日本|zhnews|Category:日本|zhquote|日本|zhvoyage|日本|zu|IJaphani|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 9480005000922 == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Watatsumitoyotamahimeno Shrine|lt=Watatsumitoyotamahimeno Shrine|qid=Q135041365|1=Watatsumitoyotamahimeno Shrine}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '徳島県徳島市不動西町4丁目2024', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:雨降神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11659781}} == Japanese content == {{Shinto shrine |Name = Amatarashi Shrine |Image = [[File:Amatarashi shrine.jpg|250px]]
Torii gate and worship hall |Location = {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|qid=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Tokushima City|Q207309|qid=Q207309|1=Tokushima (city)}}{{ill|lt=Fudō Nishimachi|Q11361655|qid=Q11361655|1=Fudō Nishimachi}} 4-chōme 2024 |Coordinates = {{Wiki coordinates 2-stage degrees minutes seconds|34|5|46.85|N|134|29|56.65|E|region:JP-36_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |Enshrined deity = {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q2329261|lt=Toyotama-hime no Mikoto|1=Toyotama-hime}} |Shrine rank = Former {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}
{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} |Founded = Unknown |Main hall = |Alternate name = |Annual festival = {{ill|lt=October 23|Q2958|qid=Q2958|1=October 23}} |Rituals = |Map = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=Amatarashi Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Amatarashi Shrine''' (あまたらしじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|lt=Fudō Nishimachi|Q11361655|qid=Q11361655|1=Fudō Nishimachi}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima City|Q207309|qid=Q207309|1=Tokushima (city)}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|qid=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}. === History === The year of foundation is unknown. It is identified with the Engishiki-listed minor shrine Watatsumi Toyotama-hime Shrine of {{ill|lt=Myōkata District|Q3205778|qid=Q3205778|1=Nakata district}}. Some sources identify it with the Shikinaisha “Ama no Iwato Waketsu Toyotama-hime Shrine.” In the 7th year of {{ill|lt=Gangyō|Q747451|qid=Q747451|1=Gangyō}} ({{ill|lt=883|Q30355|qid=Q30355|1=883}}), it was granted the court rank of {{ill|lt=Junior Fifth Rank|Q11071125|qid=Q11071125|1=Junior Fifth Rank}} Upper as a {{ill|lt=divine rank|Q11591025|qid=Q11591025|1=Shinkai (divine rank)}}. According to the “{{ill|lt=Awa-shi|Q65291985|qid=Q65291985|1=Awa-shi}},” it states: “Amatarashi Shrine—located in Niiminami Village; there is a pond in front; when rain is prayed for, it surely responds.” However, writing “雨降” and reading it as “Amatarashi” is unnatural (it would ordinarily be read as Amakudari), and there is a theory that it was originally a shrine related to {{ill|lt=Amaashi-hiko Kuni-oshihito no Mikoto|Q11443593|qid=Q11443593|1=Prince Ametarashihiko}}, who has the same reading. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q2329261|lt=Toyotama-hime no Mikoto|1=Toyotama-hime}} === Festivals === * {{ill|lt=March 4 (lunar calendar)|Q838975|qid=Q838975|lt=Old March 4|1=March 4 (Lunisolar)}} – Dada Kagura Festival * {{ill|lt=June 4 (lunar calendar)|Q839676|qid=Q839676|lt=Old June 4|1=June 4 (Lunisolar)}} – Summer Festival * {{ill|lt=October 23|Q2958|qid=Q2958|1=October 23}} – Annual festival === Access === * About 2.2 km from {{ill|lt=Ayukui Station|Q4701935|qid=Q4701935|1=Akui Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Line|Q899310|qid=Q899310|1=Tokushima Line}} of {{ill|lt=Shikoku Railway Company|Q496531|qid=Q496531|lt=JR|1=Shikoku Railway Company}}. * From Tokushima City, via {{ill|lt=Tokushima–Hiketa Line (Tokushima Prefectural / Kagawa Prefectural Route 1)|Q11490196|qid=Q11490196|1=Tokushima Prefectural Road and Kagawa Prefectural Road Route 1}}, 1 km before (south of) {{ill|lt=Nada Bridge|Q11415515|qid=Q11415515|1=Nada Bridge}}, turn west at the intersection in {{ill|lt=Fudō Nishimachi|Q11361655|qid=Q11361655|lt=Fudō Nishi|1=Fudō Nishi}} and it is immediately there. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === Related articles === * {{ill|qid=Q2329261|lt=Toyotama-hime Shrine|Q11633963|qid=Q11633963|1=Toyotama-hime}} === External links === * [https://amatarashi.com/ Amatarashi Shrine official website] {{Shinto horizontal}}
